name: python-library-course-builder
description: Build source-backed, hands-on learning repositories for Python libraries.

interface.shortDescription: Build complete Python library learning projects
interface.longDescription: Turn a Python library into a cumulative beginner course with lessons, coding labs, CLI and Web grading.
defaultPrompt: Use $building-python-library-courses to create a source-backed, hands-on course for a Python library, framework, or repository.
